title: Venture
description: Neutral, self-contained container for the Opportunity Management v2 model (supersedes discovery.schema.json from #014). A venture is a top-level '.venture' directory that may hold one or more initiatives, products, teams, records (ideas + use-cases) and backlogs. It is NOT an initiative itself. SaaS-ready: tenantId / workspaceId are reserved for a later multi-tenant server layer and carry no behavior in the file-based store.

schemaVersion.description: Contract version this document was authored against (e.g. '2.0.0').

tenantId.description: Reserved for the future multi-tenant SaaS layer; null in the local file-based store.

workspaceId.description: Reserved workspace scope for the future SaaS layer; null in the local store.

id.description: Stable unique venture id (asset identity; future federation joins on this).

slug.description: Filesystem-friendly slug, also the '<slug>.venture' directory name.

description.description: Optional longer description of the venture.
